---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Derek Sleepfield"
description-meta: "A small library of not-academic writing by Derek Wakefield."
toc: false
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
            #title-block-header { display: none; }
          </style>
---

::: {.shelf-landing}

<h1 class="shelf-title">The shelf.</h1>

<p class="shelf-lede">A small library of not-academic writing
by Derek Wakefield. Kept here quietly.</p>

<p class="shelf-para">Parables, codas, essays &mdash;
whatever else wants a home.</p>

<div class="shelf-ornament">&#x2756;&#x2756;&#x2756;</div>

<!-- =======================================================================
     Featured parable — a random Canon entry each visit.
     Data lives in stories.js, populated at site build by extracting
     all <section class="canon-block"> blocks from bobble-canon.html.
     ======================================================================= -->
<div id="shelfFeaturedParable" class="shelf-featured" aria-live="polite">
  <p class="shelf-featured-loading"><em>fetching a parable…</em></p>
</div>

<p class="shelf-featured-actions">
  <a href="#" id="shelfAnotherStory">↻ another parable</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <a href="/bobble-canon.html">read all forty &rarr;</a>
</p>

<div class="shelf-ornament">&#x2756;&#x2756;&#x2756;</div>

<p class="shelf-small">New things appear when there is something to appear.
No newsletter. No schedule. Bake when you can.</p>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-lost-bookmark">
      ／¯\_／¯\＿___
     (  ‿     ‿       )
      \_____________／
   the bookmark cat — cream-and-tan ragdoll
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-porch-light">
       ／\_／\
      (  ◉   ◉ )
       )  ω  (
       │  │  │  │
   the porch cat — charcoal shorthair, paws on the screen door
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-wildflower">
        ⚘    ⚘
       ／\_／\
      (  ◔   ◕ )⚘
        \   ω   /
   the meadow cat — cream calico in tall grass
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-frozen-wood">
      ＝❄=/\＿/\=❄＝
     ／  (  ◉   ◉  )  \
    ／    )   ω   (    \
       ▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔
   the frost cat — white Siberian, frost-tipped fur
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-highway-diner">
       ／\_／\
      (  ◎   ◎ )
       )  ⌣  (
       ▔▔▔▔▔▔
   the counter cat — pink-eared cream, two a.m. regular
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-crones-cottage">
        ✦
       ／\_／\
      (  ◉   ◉ )
       )  ω  (
       ▔▔▔▔▔
   the cottage cat — black-and-silver tortoiseshell, witch-familiar
</pre>

:::

<script src="/stories.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  function pickStory(excludeNum) {
    var stories = window.SHELF_STORIES || [];
    if (!stories.length) return null;
    if (stories.length === 1) return stories[0];
    var s, attempts = 0;
    do {
      s = stories[Math.floor(Math.random() * stories.length)];
      attempts++;
    } while (excludeNum && s.num === excludeNum && attempts < 20);
    return s;
  }

  function escapeHtml(s) {
    return s.replace(/&/g, "&amp;").replace(/</g, "&lt;").replace(/>/g, "&gt;");
  }
  // Body paragraphs already contain HTML entities decoded properly upstream;
  // we render them as-is (no further escape) so em-dashes etc. survive.
  function renderStory(s) {
    var bodyHtml = s.body.map(function (p) {
      return '<p>' + p + '</p>';
    }).join('\n');
    var codaHtml = s.coda.length
      ? '<div class="shelf-featured-coda">' +
          s.coda.map(function (line) { return '<p>' + line + '</p>'; }).join('') +
        '</div>'
      : '';
    return (
      '<h2 class="shelf-featured-title">' +
        '<span class="shelf-featured-num">Canon ' + escapeHtml(s.num) + '</span>' +
        '<span class="shelf-featured-name"> &mdash; ' + escapeHtml(s.name) + '</span>' +
      '</h2>' +
      '<div class="shelf-featured-body">' + bodyHtml + '</div>' +
      codaHtml
    );
  }

  var currentNum = null;
  function showRandom() {
    var s = pickStory(currentNum);
    var container = document.getElementById("shelfFeaturedParable");
    if (!s) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p><em>No parables loaded.</em></p>';
      return;
    }
    currentNum = s.num;
    container.innerHTML = renderStory(s);
  }

  // Initial pick on load
  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", showRandom);
  } else {
    showRandom();
  }

  // "Another parable" button
  document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
    var a = e.target.closest("#shelfAnotherStory");
    if (!a) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    showRandom();
    // Smooth scroll to the parable so users don't lose place
    document.getElementById("shelfFeaturedParable").scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
  });
})();
</script>
